translations.en: I keep my distance on the bus.
translations.fr: Dans le bus, je garde mes distances.
translations.zh-Hans: 在公交车上我会保持距离。
translations.yue: 喺巴士上我會保持距離。
translations.vi: Trên xe buýt tôi giữ khoảng cách.
translations.nl: In de bus houd ik afstand.
translations.hi: बस में मैं दूरी बनाए रखता हूँ।
translations.ja: バスでは距離を保ちます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; governs the object 'Distanz' and takes the PP 'im Bus' as a locative adjunct.
Contraction of the preposition 'in' with the definite article 'dem'; introduces a dative prepositional phrase indicating location.
Masculine common noun; here dative singular as the object of the contracted preposition 'im' (in+dem).
Feminine common noun; accusative singular as the direct object of 'halte' (collocation: 'Distanz halten' = keep distance).

sentences.target: Zwischen uns ist gerade viel Distanz.

translations.de: Zwischen uns ist gerade viel Distanz.
translations.en: There's a lot of distance between us right now.
translations.es: Ahora hay mucha distancia entre nosotros.
translations.fr: En ce moment, il y a beaucoup de distance entre nous.
translations.it: In questo momento c’è molta distanza tra noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们之间现在有很大的距离。
translations.yue: 我哋而家之間有好多距離。
translations.pt: Neste momento há muita distância entre nós.
translations.tr: Şu an aramızda büyük bir mesafe var.
translations.vi: Bây giờ giữa chúng ta có nhiều khoảng cách.
translations.nl: Er is nu veel afstand tussen ons.
translations.hi: अभी हमारे बीच काफी दूरी है।
translations.pl: Teraz jest między nami duży dystans.
translations.el: Τώρα υπάρχει μεγάλη απόσταση μεταξύ μας.
translations.nb: Nå er det stor avstand mellom oss.
translations.id: Sekarang ada jarak yang besar di antara kita.
translations.sv: Just nu är det mycket avstånd metaξύ maς.
translations.ro: Acum e multă distanță între noi.
translations.cs: Teď je mezi námi velký odstup.
translations.da: Lige nu er der meget afstand mellem os.
translations.fi: Nyt meidän välillämme on paljon etäisyyttä.
translations.ja: 今、私たちの間には大きな距離がある。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; forms a fronted PP setting the spatial/relational frame.
1st person plural personal pronoun; dative case as object of 'zwischen'.
Finite copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the predicate nominal to the clause.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates current state.
Quantifying determiner modifying 'Distanz' (amount).
Feminine common noun; nominative singular as the predicate nominal (and semantic subject) in a copular construction.

sentences.target: Die Distanz zum Ziel beträgt zehn Kilometer.
sentences.reading: /diː dɪsˈtanʦ ʦʊm ʦiːl bəˈtʁɛːkt ʦeːn kiloˈmeːtɐ/

translations.de: Die Distanz zum Ziel beträgt zehn Kilometer.
translations.ipa: /diː dɪsˈtanʦ ʦʊm ʦiːl bəˈtʁɛːkt ʦeːn kiloˈmeːtɐ/
translations.en: The distance to the finish is ten kilometers.
translations.es: La distancia hasta la meta es de diez kilómetros.
translations.fr: La distance jusqu’à l’arrivée est de dix kilomètres.
translations.it: La distanza al traguardo è di dieci chilometri.
translations.zh-Hans: 到终点的距离是十公里。
translations.yue: 到終點嘅距離係十公里。
translations.ru: Расстояние до финиша составляет десять километров.
translations.pt: A distância até a linha de chegada é de dez quilômetros.
translations.he: המרחק לקו הסיום הוא עשרה קילומטרים.
translations.vi: Quãng đường đến đích là mười cây số.
translations.ar: المسافة إلى خط النهاية عشرة كيلومترات.
translations.nl: De afstand tot de finish is tien kilometer.
translations.uk: Відстань до фінішу становить десять кілометрів.
translations.hu: A célvonalig tíz kilométer a távolság.
translations.hi: मंज़िल तक की दूरी दस किलोमीटर है।
translations.pl: Dystans do mety wynosi dziesięć kilometrów.
translations.el: Η απόσταση μέχρι τον τερματισμό είναι δέκα χιλιόμετρα.
translations.nb: Avstanden til mål eίvai ti kilometer.
translations.id: Jarak ke garis finis adalah sepuluh kilometer.
translations.sv: Avståndet till målet är tio kilometer.
translations.ro: Distanța până la linia de sosire este de zece kilometri.
translations.cs: Vzdálenost do cíle je deset kilometrů.
translations.da: Afstanden til mål er ti kilometer.
translations.ja: ゴールまでの距離は10キロです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular agreeing with 'Distanz'.
Feminine common noun; nominative singular as the subject.
Contraction of 'zu' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative, introducing a goal/reference PP.
Neuter common noun; dative singular as the complement of 'zum'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a measure phrase as its complement.
Cardinal numeral quantifying 'Kilometer'.
Common noun denoting unit of length; here plural form functioning as a measure complement (accusative of measure).

sentences.target: Ich mag etwas Distanz beim Arbeiten.

translations.de: Ich mag etwas Distanz beim Arbeiten.
translations.en: I like a bit of distance when working.
translations.es: Me gusta tener un poco de espacio al trabajar.
translations.fr: J’aime avoir un peu d’espace quand je travaille.
translations.it: Mi piace avere un po’ di spazio quando lavoro.
translations.ko: 일할 때는 약간 거리를 두는 게 좋아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 工作时我喜欢保持一点距离。
translations.yue: 做嘢嘅時候我鍾意保持少少距離。
translations.ru: Мне нравится, когда при работе есть немного личного пространства.
translations.pt: Gosto de ter um pouco de espaço quando trabalho.
translations.he: כשאני עובד אני אוהב קצת מרחב.
translations.vi: Khi làm việc tôi thích có một chút không gian.
translations.ar: أحب أن يكون هناك بعض المساحة عندما أعمل.
translations.nl: Als ik werk, heb ik graag wat ruimte.
translations.uk: Коли я працюю, мені подобається мати трохи простору.
translations.hu: Munka közben szeretek egy kis teret.
translations.hi: काम करते समय मुझे थोड़ी जगह पसंद है।
translations.pl: Lubię mieć trochę przestrzeni, gdy pracuję.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να έχω λίγο χώρο όταν δουλεύω.
translations.nb: Når jeg jobber, liker jeg å ha litt plass.
translations.id: Saat bekerja saya suka punya sedikit ruang.
translations.sv: När jag jobbar vill я ha lite utrymme.
translations.ro: Când lucrez îmi place să am puțin spațiu.
translations.cs: Když pracuji, mám rád trochu prostoru.
translations.da: Når jeg arbejder, vil jeg gerne have lidt plads.
translations.ja: 仕事中は少し距離をとりたいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present.
Indefinite quantifying determiner modifying 'Distanz'.
Feminine common noun; accusative singular as the direct object of 'mag'.
Contraction of 'bei' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative, introducing a circumstantial PP ('during/at the activity').
Nominalized infinitive functioning as a noun; dative singular as the complement of 'beim'.

Ich mag etwas Distanz beim Arbeiten.

There's a lot of distance between us right now.
The distance to the finish is ten kilometers.
I like a bit of distance when working.
